purpose: Ensure the current Kuklabs app actually implements the universal login/signup screen.
mandatoryChecks: The actual current app contains the approved Login / Sign Up screen.
The current product icon, name, tagline and approved accent are used.
All other structure, spacing, typography and component sizes remain shared.
The screen connects to shared Kuklabs AuthKit.
Official Google multicolour G is used.
No raw JSON or framework errors appear.
Mobile/email smart detection and E.164 submission work.
